use_cases: Display subscription plan details with title, description, and pricing information
Show pricing tiers in SaaS applications with flexible content areas
Create product feature cards with consistent card primitives
Build membership or subscription management interfaces
Present product offerings with card-based layouts
ai_summary: A card primitive system (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) designed for subscription and pricing card implementations. Features a flat, minimalist design with rounded corners, subtle shadows, and clean borders. Built on shadcn/ui-style conventions using Tailwind CSS classes for consistent theming. Suitable for SaaS subscription pages, pricing tables, and membership tier displays across desktop and mobile platforms.
